title: HONESTAI: Measuring Metacognitive Abilities in LLMs
description: HONESTAI benchmark: 200 deterministic evaluation items and evaluation code to measure LLM metacognition (accuracy under uncertainty, calibration, hallucination, abstention, self-correction). Includes dataset, evaluator.py, notebook, and examples. Change the `id` field to match your Kaggle username/dataset slug before uploading.
